pattern: For a positive number insert the digit before the first smaller digit, and for a negative number insert it before the first larger digit, scanning left to right.
hints: Treat the sign separately; only the digit sequence to the right of any minus matters.
For a positive value, placing x as early as possible while it strictly exceeds the current digit raises the most significant part.
For a negative value the magnitude should be smallest, so insert x before the first digit that is strictly greater than x.

edge_inputs.description: positive insert at front when x is largest
positive insert at end when x is smallest
negative insert at end when x larger than all

stress.description: long numbers with random sign and digits one through nine
